title: Add Zephyr CoAP client test target
description: The LICHEN Zephyr CoAP client subsystem has no dedicated test app or compile target that exercises lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_client.c. Add a narrow test/build target for lichen_coap_request parameter validation and timeout range handling so fixes like project-LICHEN-i81y.13 can be verified locally.
close_reason: Completed: added focused Zephyr CoAP client API validation test target covering invalid request/post_cbor parameters and timeout overflow bounds.
